stemHtml: On ILS to Naples runway 24 in poor visibility, less than 4 NM from the threshold. What ATC message would you expect?

options.a: FASTBIRD 166, REPORT RUNWAY 24 IN SIGHT, WIND 270 DEGREES 15 KNOTS.
options.b: FASTBIRD 166, ILS APPROACH TO RUNWAY 24, CLEARED TO LAND.
options.c: FASTBIRD 166, REPORT FINAL RUNWAY 24, WIND 360 DEGREES 18 KNOTS.
options.d: FASTBIRD 166, CLEARED TO LAND RUNWAY 24, WIND 270 DEGREES 15 KNOTS.
